ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Chief Executive Officer of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_trading_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Daily price change of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Daily price change percentage of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, cancelled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time the order was executed */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_orders_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment gateway (active/inactive) */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* Currencies supported by the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trading_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being added to the watchlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes about the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose setting it is */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, Dow Jones) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the index value was updated */,
  "change" REAL /* Daily change in the index value */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Daily change percentage in the index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance was updated */,
  "change" REAL /* Daily change in sector performance */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Daily change percentage in sector performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
